user.title: UeHome Floor Heating
user.description: Scan for UeHome UDP state broadcasts. Devices already added will not be shown again.

select.title: Choose UeHome devices
select.description: Select the thermostats to add. Unknown devices broadcasting on the same UDP port can be left unchecked.

passwords.title: Enter device passwords
passwords.description: Enter the password for each selected thermostat: {discovered_devices}

abort.already_configured: UeHome Floor Heating is already configured.
abort.devices_added: Selected devices were added to the existing UeHome Floor Heating integration.

error.cannot_listen: Could not listen for UDP broadcasts on this port.
error.no_new_devices: No new unconfigured UeHome devices were discovered.
error.password_required: A password is required for every selected device.
